item.title: About
item.description:
I like understanding how things work — from math on paper to code running on hardware. This blog is my notebook.

I’m a curious person by nature. Science, engineering, programming, artificial intelligence — I’m drawn to anything that rewards digging deeper. I never consider myself an expert in any subject, just someone who enjoys learning and solving problems.

Professionally I’ve worked across machine learning — computer vision, natural language processing, data science. But curiosity doesn’t stay in one lane, and neither does this blog.
